allow: Bash(node -e "const v = require\('./node_modules/vite/package.json'\); const vi = require\('./node_modules/vitest/package.json'\); console.log\('vite:', v.version, 'vitest:', vi.version\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(entry, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('nested vitest version:', entry?.version || 'NOT IN LOCK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('nested after dedupe:', entry?.version || 'REMOVED'\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('nested:', entry?.version || 'REMOVED'\)")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('nested vitest:', entry?.version || 'REMOVED \(hoisted\)'\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('result:', entry?.version || 'DEDUPED'\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry = lock.packages?.['packages/runtime-core/node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('nested:', entry?.version || 'DEDUPED'\)")
